title: Peppery Australian Chicken Bisque
description: A creamy and flavorful chicken bisque with a peppery kick, inspired by Australian cuisine. This comforting soup is perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat the sick day broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the australian peppercorn to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bisque to the pot and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
